v2.3.3 — Bug Fix
🐛 Fixed the HUD jumping to the top-left corner when changing any setting while using a top or right anchor position.

announcement.title: ⚔️ Stylish Action HUD v2.3.3
announcement.content:
v2.3.3 — Bug Fix

  • Fixed the HUD jumping to the top-left corner when changing settings with a top or right anchor.
